message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and beads issue tracker

- Cargo.lock: regenerated lockfile reflecting dependency changes from
  async_ossl, uds, client, and mux-server-impl Cargo.toml updates
- .beads/config.yaml: beads configuration update
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync beads issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 issue_prefix: ft
 prefix: ft
-db: beads.db.scratch_20260401T174626Z
+db: beads.db

@@ -498,6 +498,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "async-io",
+ "futures",
  "openssl",
 ]
 
@@ -3494,7 +3495,6 @@ name = "frankenterm-mux-server-impl"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
- "async-io",
  "async_ossl",
  "codec",
  "config",
@@ -3642,6 +3642,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "async-io",
+ "futures",
  "uds_windows",
 ]
